title: Simple Shopping
description: Allows for simple, scam-free, grief-free shopping on your survival server!
body:
![Simple Shopping Main Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fae6083aa5da743e8d15008e96c7a3a15a9f69f3.png)

#  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ    έΑΟ      έΑΟ       έΑΟ    έΑΟ           έΑΟΏθΤΟ Simple Shopping ΏθδΤ
Ever wanted to have a **cooler look** in your survival server's **shops** than a bunch of barrels and chests with items? Ever wanted to **not be scammed or stolen from** when **selling** your precious goods? Well, Simple Shopping is just the datapack for you!

##  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ   έΑΟ     έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ έΑΟ έΑΟ έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ     έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ   έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ   έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ    έΑΟέγβΎ╕Π How does it work? ΏθΤτ
**Simple Shopping** adds 3 new triggers you can use to interact with and **sell items**, as well as a few other features to use with them.

##  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ   έΑΟ     έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ έΑΟ έΑΟ έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ     έΑΟ  έΑΟ  έΑΟ   έΑΟ  έΑΟ ΏθδΤ Selling and buying items ΏθΤΟ
To **sell** an item, stand near an item **you** have thrown and run the following command:
```
/trigger ss.sell set <DIAMOND AMOUNT>
```
or, to sell for 1 diamond:
```
/trigger ss.sell
```
The item then cannot be destroyed, moved or picked up in any way, except for 2 cases:

έΩΠ The owner of the item cancels the sale;

έΩΠ Someone buys the item.

To **buy** an item, the process is much more simple, you just need to throw an amount of diamonds equal to the price onto the item.

> ΏθΤκ To **collect** your hard-earned **diamonds**, you just need to pick them up after someone **buys** the item, **you are the only one who can**! They will be at the **exact location** you sold them.

> ΏθΤκ You can find more info in the changelog.
